text: A for loop in Python is used to iterate over a sequence such as a list, tuple, or string.
A while loop in Python repeatedly executes a block of code as long as a condition is true.
Functions in Python are defined using the def keyword and are used to encapsulate reusable code.
Machine learning is a subset of artificial intelligence that enables systems to learn from data.
Supervised learning uses labeled data to train models, while unsupervised learning uses unlabeled data.
